column16: Upcycled Sewing Studio (This is a 2hr Class. You can sign up for one or both hours)
column25: Join the Quest: Percy Jackson Adventure Club
column28: Upcycled Sewing Studio (This is a 2hr Class. You can sign up for one or both hours)

column8: We are going to be cracking some eggs, whisking cream and getting down in the kitchen with our littlest cooks learning how to make Dutch babies, fruit galettes and more!!
column9: In this class we will read and learn about different types of puppets and a bit about the history of puppets/puppeteers. We will make our own puppets in a few different styles and even put on a short puppet show if you wish!
column10: Building a cardboard boat, making pirate names and decor, learning pirate songs, learn knots
column11: What’s beneath our feet? Worm investigations! Model of the Earth’s layers! Let’s do some core samples to find out where the best place to build a house! What does trash tell us about a civilization? How do archaeologists study trash?
column12: Snip it, rip it, stick it! Let’s turn my ART life chaos into AWESOME. 🎨✂️😄
column14: Bring in your favorite board games to play with friends or borrow some of ours!
column15: Come work on your improv skills! Whether you’re an experienced improver or brand new  to the form, you’re welcome to join the fun. Yes, let’s!
column16: This is an open ended sewing studio. haberdashery, sewing machine safety, and basic sewing by hand will be provided. {Please bring old or retired clothes, fabric, bits and bobs that they want to add to their upcycled creation}
column21: We will play games and hang out. If the weather is pleasant we will move outside!
column22: Do you like pop, rock, jazz, broadway hits, classical, techno, …? Each week we will have a different style of music playing as we create our own art. Let the music inspire you and get your creative juices flowing. A variety of art supplies and mediums will be available to you each week and music requests will be taken!
column23: All ages welcome as long as you know your letters! Let's play bingo and win prizes!
column24: Want to know if you, your cat, or your dog has the cleanest mouth? What about if Crazy Cat ladies are a real thing? Have you heard of Pavlov's dogs and pet training? Would it work on your siblings?
column25: Calling all demigods! Are you ready to live your own hero’s journey? Each week, we’ll step into the world of Percy Jackson for epic role-playing quests, "pretend" combat training with safe swords and archery, and themed snacks. Expect plenty of "blue" treats, high-stakes games, and a chance to hang out with fellow fans of the series. If you’ve ever wanted to attend Camp Half-Blood, this is your chance!
column26: In this class students will learn 2-3 simple chords that can be used to play dozens of songs! They will learn how to properly hold and care for a ukulele. Bring your singing voice because we will be singing along to all the new fun songs we learn!
column27: This is a student led D&D club.
column28: This is an open ended sewing studio. haberdashery, sewing machine safety, and basic sewing by hand will be provided. {Please bring old or retired clothes, fabric, bits and bobs that they want to add to their upcycled creation}
